header.title: Better Communication Across Cultures at Work
header.subtitle: Helping international teams and local staff communicate and collaborate effectively across cultures
header.description: Practical, discussion-based workshops that enhance communication and collaboration in multicultural workplaces and international business. I help individuals and teams build cultural awareness, navigate different communication styles and approaches to decision-making, and work together more effectively across cultures.

image.alt: Genevieve, intercultural communication trainer, smiling outdoors among spring blossoms

about.title: About Me
about.body:
I am an intercultural trainer specialising in communication and collaboration in multicultural workplaces. I work in higher education and with companies. Through my teaching and training, I have gained valuable experience working with people from a wide range of cultural backgrounds. My own experience of living and working in different countries further enriches this perspective.

My workshops are tailored to the needs of each organisation. Using real-life examples, workplace situations and interactive activities, participants develop practical communication and collaboration skills that they can immediately apply in their own workplace.

All workshops are delivered in English. Drawing on my background as a Business English trainer, I adapt my language and communication style to suit participants' English proficiency levels, ensuring an inclusive and engaging learning environment.

My academic background includes a Master's degree in Adult Learning in Global Change, a Postgraduate Diploma in Intercultural Competence, and a Bachelor's degree in Psychology and Sociology.

image.alt: Genevieve collaborating during a cross-cultural communication workshop in a modern office.
